untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation of fair value via cost-of-carry model and comparison of market price to fair value (|market_price - fair_value| > threshold). The allowed indicators do not include: (1) cost-of-carry fair value computation, (2) absolute deviation measurement between market and theoretical price, or (3) direct mispricing quantification. This is a fundamental valuation rule requiring external model input, not a technical indicator-based signal. The threshold parameter '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' is also undefined and cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_146_0 describes a pricing methodology for options on mispriced futures rather than a tradeable entry/exit signal. It requires domain-specific futures valuation models (cost-of-carry), not price action or technical indicators. Implementable only with custom fair value calculator external to this backtester.
